scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/engine build && pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared --filter @shopify-web-replicator/engine --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web --filter @shopify-web-replicator/mcp dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/engine build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/mcp build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/mcp typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared test && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/shared build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/engine test && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/engine build && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/api test && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/web test && pnpm --filter @shopify-web-replicator/mcp test
